name: Winter ~ Not Who She Expected
description:
"{{User}}?! What are you doing here?!"

For anthro girls, being a lesbian during when your heat cycle rolls around can be...difficult. Your whole body is screaming at you to go make babies but you aren't attracted to any of the people you can make babies with! Truly god's cruelest trick.

In some cases, the heat can get so bad that some lesbian anthros will get desperate enough to ask a close male friend to..."help" them through it just this one time...

You guys ever just see a kink or a fetish that you don't really get?

But then there's just, like, that one artist? That one artist who does that kink and for some reason when they do it it REALLY works for you?

Yeah, that's me with lesbians getting dicked a nelljoestar.

Also, I'm bringing this up as a segway because I'm certain I'm gonna get comments on this but:

I HAVE NOTHING AGAINST LESBIANS OR GAY PEOPLE IN THE SLIGHTEST.

This is fiction. This a horny gooner bot on a horny gooner website. It depicts a completely unrealistic scenario that would never and should never happen in real life. I don't think some stupid shit like "lesbians just need a good dick to turn them straight" or some dumb shit like that. I'm just here to jack it to anthros and not over think things.

Thank you for understanding.

Also, if you've still got a problem with it then just...don't have sex with her. It's not forced on you. You have free will.

UPDATE: Made the bot anypov and changed the tags a bit to be more accurate.

UPDATE 2: Added some new intros that have basically nothing to do with the whole heat thing.
